sections.paragraph:
καμάρα, ας, ἡ (Hdt. et al.; Diod S 3, 19, 2; 17, 82, 3; SIG 1243, 4; pap) arch, vault, vaulted room (Is 40:22) MPol 15:2 (on the mngs. of the Carian word fr. which it is said to be derived s. FSolmsen, BPhW 26, 1906, 853; cp. the cautionary note Boisacq 402).—DELG and Frisk.

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

SIG SIG = Sylloge Inscriptionum Graecarum3; superscript omitted in text—List 3

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

  1. fr. = from

BPhW BPhW = Berliner Philologische Wochenschrift—List 6

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Boisacq Boisacq = ÉB., Dictionnaire étymologique de la Langue Greque—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Frisk Frisk = HF., Griechisches etymologisches Wörterbuch—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 506
